top_signals.summary: Populist Democratic candidate denies accusation as deadline looms to replace him on the ballot

top_signals.title: Graham Platner denies sex assault claim as Democrats urge him to quit Maine Senate campaign
top_signals.summary: Platner and his campaign denied the accusations made by 41-year-old Maine resident Jenny Racicot in a POLITICO article published Monday.

top_signals.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes ‘Extremely Lean’ Ethereum, shrinking the chain to near-zero state with ZK proofs
top_signals.summary: Buterin outlined a two-step plan to shift Ethereum's state management to validators and replace per-epoch balance updates with ZK proofs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Student loan servicers begin 90-day countdown for borrowers to leave SAVE plan
top_signals.summary: Student loan servicers have begun alerting borrowers that they have 90 days to leave the Biden-era SAVE plan. Here's what comes next.
